questions.prompt: Did you wait in that long bookstore line?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you wait in that long bookstore line?
questions.answer: I ordered all my textbooks online instead.

questions.prompt: Are you still going to the gym every day?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you still going to the gym every day?
questions.answer: I haven't worked out since last Monday.

questions.prompt: I keep forgetting the wifi password.
questions.prompt_task_text: I keep forgetting the wifi password.
questions.answer: You can reset it at the desk.

questions.prompt: Are you going to the study abroad session?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you going to the study abroad session?
questions.answer: I want to know whether my credits will transfer.

questions.prompt: Where do you usually study during finals?
questions.prompt_task_text: Where do you usually study during finals?
questions.answer: I found a corner that nobody else seems to use.

questions.prompt: Did the printing system change?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did the printing system change?
questions.answer: The library printers now only accept mobile payments.

questions.prompt: I can't find the syllabus anywhere.
questions.prompt_task_text: I can't find the syllabus anywhere.
questions.answer: Do you know if it's posted on the portal?

questions.prompt: Did you find someone to write your reference?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you find someone to write your reference?
questions.answer: I emailed the professor whose seminar I enjoyed the most last term.

questions.prompt: Are you stopping by the career fair Thursday?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you stopping by the career fair Thursday?
questions.answer: I'm planning to drop by after my lab.

questions.prompt: Did your group finish the presentation slides?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did your group finish the presentation slides?
questions.answer: I asked my teammates whether the slides we prepared were ready to submit.

questions.prompt: Did you see the advising office's new location?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you see the advising office's new location?
questions.answer: I stopped by there earlier this afternoon.

questions.prompt: I'm not sure how to cite this source.
questions.prompt_task_text: I'm not sure how to cite this source.
questions.answer: You should check the writing center guide.

questions.prompt: Are you ready for spring registration?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you ready for spring registration?
questions.answer: I wonder whether the popular labs fill up quickly.

questions.prompt: Did you find any campus jobs worth applying to?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you find any campus jobs worth applying to?
questions.answer: I applied for the position that the library posted yesterday.

questions.prompt: Are you keeping up with the reading this term?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you keeping up with the reading this term?
questions.answer: I haven't kept up with the assigned chapters.

questions.prompt: What did the announcement about the lab say?
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the announcement about the lab say?
questions.answer: The lab session that they cancelled will run next week.

questions.prompt: What did the advisor tell you about switching majors?
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the advisor tell you about switching majors?
questions.answer: The advisor explained which requirements remain for the major.

questions.prompt: The seminar room keeps changing.
questions.prompt_task_text: The seminar room keeps changing.
questions.answer: Do you know where they moved today's lecture?

questions.prompt: Are you finally joining a club this year?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you finally joining a club this year?
questions.answer: I'm thinking about the debate team this semester.

questions.prompt: Did you sort out your financial aid?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you sort out your financial aid?
questions.answer: I asked whether the scholarship I received covers the lab fees too.
